Dialog.name: MSG_0198_0_0

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Absorb incoming Dark damage so that it heals instead of harms.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0825_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises user's Attack at the start of battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0826_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0827_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises user's Accuracy/Evasion at the start of battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0828_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0829_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises party's Defense at the start of battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0830_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises party's Accuracy/Evasion at the start of battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0831_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Temporarily raises user's critical rate at the start of battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0833_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Halves the chance of taking a critical hit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0834_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Doubles the chance of dealing a critical hit.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0835_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Survive a fatal blow with 1 HP remaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0836_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Survive a fatal blow with HP fully recovered.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0838_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Recover 8% of max HP and SP after winning a battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0839_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Fully recover HP and SP after winning a battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0841_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the effect of healing skills.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0845_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earn 25% EXP, even when not participating in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0846_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earn 50% EXP, even when not participating in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0847_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Earn 100% EXP, even when not participating in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0848_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly reduces the hit rate of incoming attacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0849_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reduces incoming damage by half, but cannot dodge any attacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0850_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Medium chance to survive 1 Light instakill attack with 1 HP remaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0851_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Automatically survive 1 Light instakill attack with 1 HP remaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0852_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0853_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0854_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Automatically survive 1 magic instakill attack with 1 HP remaining.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0856_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reduces the HP cost of physical skills by half.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0857_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reduces the SP cost of magic skills by half.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Automatically strengthen Almighty skills by 50%. Can stack.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increase resistance to physical damage. Negates physical weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0890_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}When Shifting to an ally, that ally recovers 5 SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0891_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0892_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0893_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0894_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Attack up by 20% until end of turn when on the receiving end of a Shift.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Doubles the effects of Life Drain and Spirit Drain.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases power of attacks that target 1 foe by 15%.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0897_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0901_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases damage when striking a foe's weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0902_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0903_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reduces the SP cost of recovery skills to 50% of their normal SP cost.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0904_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0905_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0906_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly raises critical rate and greatly increases critical hit strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0907_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Increases the effects of buffs on self.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0908_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly increases the effects of buffs on self.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0909_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0910_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Greatly raises critical rate on foes with ailments (with Mitsuru in battle).[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0911_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Reduces damage taken when an ally's weakness is struck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0912_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0916_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Automatically recover 10 SP each turn in battle.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0917_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lowers Accuracy/Evasion of 1 random foe for 3 turns when a battle starts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0918_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Lowers Accuracy/Evasion of all foes for 3 turns when a battle starts.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_0919_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0920_0_0

Dialog.name: MSG_0921_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Attack up by 20% until end of turn when receiving a Shift from Aigis.[n]{f 1 1}
